response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the Japanese and English lyrics provided in the Reference JSON for both 'FOCUS' and 'DARK ARIA <LV2>'. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the provided lyrics and English translations for disambiguation and semantic consistency. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are strictly anchored to vocal bursts. Applied instantaneous transitions in rapid sections of 'FOCUS' and timed the silent title cards for both songs based on their visual duration on screen.
